title: [SBW] Tactical Drone
description: Expands [SBW] Drone with Anti-Drone Nets, signal jammer, siren, and improved drone mechanics.
body:
**🚁 [SBW] Tactical Drone**

Take your drone gameplay to the next level.
[SBW] Tactical Drone transforms the standard SBW drone into a powerful, realistic, and fully tactical system.

**Requires: [SBW] Superb Warfare**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Overview**

This addon massively upgrades the default SBW drone with unlimited range, advanced systems, and tactical tools.

🚁 The drone has also been visually scaled up, making it feel bigger, more realistic, and more immersive.

Fly your drone like a real FPV unit, manage its energy, and dominate the battlefield.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔥 Main Features**

🚀 Unlimited Flight Range
No more distance limits
Fly your drone as far as you want

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔋 Battery System**

Drone now uses energy while flying
Recharge using a battery in your main hand + right click
Energy level is shown in the HUB

![battery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41dea3f5ebcc9bc7f00cb1725b183a95bd72a111.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🎮 FPV Combat Drone**

Fully usable as an FPV drone
Deal high damage when crashing into targets 💥

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**📏 Bigger Drone Model**

Drone is now significantly larger
Feels more realistic and easier to see during flight

BEFORE:

![small drone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2757b6359f03eaf7b2de3f9c9bf988ac666856.png)

AFTER:

![big drone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bf51f79c5a3664dcf76ee0973b54f30b8a6fb8e.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🌧️ Dynamic Weather Effects**

🌧️ Rain → Reduced visibility & signal
⛈️ Storm → Unstable flight + higher energy usage

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🧠 Smart Systems**

📏 Distance meter in HUD
📦 Drone inventory (chest-like storage)
🔥 Crash explosion system
🌡️ Thermal Vision (highlight entities)

![terminal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa2c0be0b26846597873c705f74e3953687c687a_0.webp)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🛡️ Defense & Utility Blocks**

🚨 Drone Detection Siren

Detects nearby drones

Plays alarm sound 🔊

Outputs redstone signal

Supports drone blacklist

**⚙️ How to Use (Ignore Your Own Drone)**

Place the siren on the ground

Rename your drone using an anvil

Enter that same name into the Drone Detection Siren

➡️ The siren will now ignore your drone and only detect others

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**📡 Drone Jammer**

Handheld jammer & radar

Shows drones on screen

Can block or disrupt control

Toggle ON/OFF

**⚙️ How to Use**

Right click to activate the Drone Jammer

A radar appears on the right side of your screen

You will hear a beeping sound when drones are nearby

➡️ While active, the jammer will force all drones within a 32 block radius to crash ( Not explode )

![jammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479bfb8346e619652b9bb938c969f1936ae9bb85.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🕸️ Anti-Drone Net**

Place around your base

If a drone hits it → connection is instantly lost

Players can walk through it

**📦 Extraction Crate**

Drone lands on it → items get extracted automatically

Stores items like a container

**⚙️ How to Use**

Put items into your drone (right click)

Fly your drone to the Extraction Crate

Land on top of the crate

➡️ The crate will automatically pull all items out of the drone inventory and store them inside

🎯 Delivery time!

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚙️ Configuration**

🛠️ This mod is fully configurable to fit your playstyle or modpack.

📁 Config file location: config/sbwdroneconfig-common.toml

✔ Adjust energy usage
✔ Tweak drone behavior
✔ Balance jammer range & effects
✔ Customize gameplay systems

**⚙️ Advanced Systems**

🧍 Player Anchor
Keeps your player synced with the drone → no chunk/load issues

🗺️ Map Compatibility
Hides your player marker on map mods (like Xaero) during drone usage

🔊 Improved Sounds & Textures
Enhanced immersion and feedback

🧾 Extra Tooltips & Recipes
All new items include crafting recipes and descriptions

📦 What This Mod Adds
✔ Bigger drone render & model
✔ Extended / unlimited range
✔ Player-anchor system
✔ Thermal Vision
✔ Battery system with HUD
✔ Distance meter
✔ Drone inventory
✔ Weather effects
✔ Crash explosion system
✔ Drone Detection Siren
✔ Drone Jammer with radar
✔ Anti-Drone Net
✔ Extraction Crate
✔ Map compatibility (Xaero)
✔ Sound & texture improvements

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
